articles.title: Thinking about the Darvin Ham days
articles.original_title: Thinking about the Darvin Ham days
articles.summary: I’ve been watching reruns of the 2023 Lakers Warriors series to see how they used Kevon Looney on the offense, and it reminded me how good Darvin Ham’s defensive tactics and adjustments were that series, and how weird it is that someone who did that good also had some of the dumbest, goofiest coaching ideas and moments ever. Game 1 the Lakers top locked the Warriors to death and won. Game 2 the Warriors adjusted by putting AD in the P&R and starting JaVontae Green instead of Looney and won.
